case_title: JANN, BRADLEY, G. et al vs. LUJAN, KARA S. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JANN, BRADLEY, G. JANN, BRIAN JANN, BRANDON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUJAN, KARA S. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF ON 8/7/96 $1,360.00 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,955.00, LEASE FORFEITED
